Gandi Totem Spirit:
So, what do you think about my trial? It's hard, isn't it?
And yet you managed to prevail, even though the Mystic Wine has begun to take its toll. You've proved your worth once again.
You should be proud of yourself. Only a few ever managed to pass this test.
You have to remember though, that you can never defeat fear completely. This victory is but a step on the way to an even greater challenge.
